query:
-- Desativar TODOS os feeds que falharam (fetchErrorCount > 0)
UPDATE rss_feeds SET active = 0 WHERE fetchErrorCount > 0;

-- Garantir que os feeds verificados estejam ativos e com erro zerado
UPDATE rss_feeds SET active = 1, fetchErrorCount = 0 
WHERE url IN (
  'https://www.morningagclips.com/feed/',
  'https://www.theagribiz.com/feed/',
  'https://campoenegocios.com/feed',
  'https://agenciabrasil.ebc.com.br/rss/economia/feed.xml',
  'https://www.farmprogress.com/rss.xml',
  'https://agro.estadao.com.br/feed',
  'https://www.safras.com.br/feed/'
);

-- Verificar resultado
SELECT id, name, active, fetchErrorCount, SUBSTRING(url,1,60) as url FROM rss_feeds ORDER BY active DESC, id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4NB7wDmWZnevaBM.bca307a445f7 --database DnUdFrKHHkwTKFvjBnpLjH --execute 
-- Desativar TODOS os feeds que falharam (fetchErrorCount > 0)
UPDATE rss_feeds SET active = 0 WHERE fetchErrorCount > 0;

-- Garantir que os feeds verificados estejam ativos e com erro zerado
UPDATE rss_feeds SET active = 1, fetchErrorCount = 0 
WHERE url IN (
  'https://www.morningagclips.com/feed/',
  'https://www.theagribiz.com/feed/',
  'https://campoenegocios.com/feed',
  'https://agenciabrasil.ebc.com.br/rss/economia/feed.xml',
  'https://www.farmprogress.com/rss.xml',
  'https://agro.estadao.com.br/feed',
  'https://www.safras.com.br/feed/'
);

-- Verificar resultado
SELECT id, name, active, fetchErrorCount, SUBSTRING(url,1,60) as url FROM rss_feeds ORDER BY active DESC, id;
